name: FightGunnarChell
_source: s;Gunnar;Huh, you look familiar{tgm}...{c:e;Gunnar;Smile}{tgm} Yeah, I see the resemblance now.|There was that one pegasus rider. You're her kid, yeah?|{c:e;Gunnar;HalfCloseEyes,Smile}Let's see if you're a screamer like she was.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;Chell;You monster! You'll finally pay for what you've done!;StyleNid=boss_convo_right;MessageTail=None
